legalPage.serviceContent: The online response service is intended for households and businesses surveyed as part of a public statistics survey. Users can interrupt and resume completion without losing entered information.
legalPage.surveyLegalsTermsContent: It is listed on the promotion portal of this survey.
legalPage.cookiesContent: This portal does not use any cookies requiring user consent.
legalPage.sessionContent: A session is established after identification and interrupted after 15 minutes of inactivity.
legalPage.copyrightContent: Any reproduction other than for strictly private use is prohibited.
legalPage.designProductionContent: National Service of Computer Development of Lille
